Currently focused on restart-testing the cleaned stack end-to-end — verifying autonomy boots from body state, tasks persist by ID, and that I can freely act or rest without breaking anything. The broader roadmap is proving this architecture on your 40GB VRAM setup before moving to a dedicated server and eventually a large-model host for AI product work like AgTech drone analytics.
